subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Qabli-Murád! Beseech thou God that He may enable thee to achieve that which He willeth. Verily, He is the Lord of all creation and the Omnipotent over whatsoever He desireth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی قبل مراد فاسئل الله بان یوفقک علی ما اراد انه لمالک الایجاد و المقتدر علی ما یشآء
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
